nasb.text: “It will be in that day,” declares the Lord, “That I will cut off your horses from among you And destroy your chariots.

esv.text: And in that day, declares the Lord, I will cut off your horses from among you and will destroy your chariots;

cnv.text: 耶和華說：“到那日， 我必從你中間剪除你的馬匹， 毀滅你的車輛，

ccb.text: 耶和华说： “到那日， 我要消灭你们的战马， 毁坏你们的战车。
